title: Custom 3D Mace
body:
This TP will change the boring 2d mace into custom 3d mace!!!!!!!   :)

This is ensipred from Glory SMP!!!!!!

BTW, I have also a youtube channel and a discrod server so if you want any version of my any creation so just contact me on my discord!!!!!!   :)
